hero.name: Victor Theodoro
hero.description: A passionate developer creating solutions that transform lives. Specialized in modern, scalable web and mobile solutions focused on real impact.

about.title: About Me
about.bio: I'm a FullStack developer from Registro, São Paulo, Brazil, passionate about technology and innovation. My journey started at ETEC de Registro, where I developed WACS — an intelligent wheelchair automation system that promotes independence for people with disabilities. This experience taught me that technology has the power to transform lives.
about.bio2: I combine solid technical skills in web and mobile development with a vision focused on social impact. I'm constantly learning and creating solutions that make a difference.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Tailored solutions for your business
services.websites_desc: Modern institutional websites and high-conversion landing pages. Responsive design, SEO-optimized, and high performance.
services.mobile_desc: Cross-platform apps with React Native for iOS and Android. Intuitive interface and native experience.
services.systems_desc: Custom fullstack platforms. From database to interface, robust systems for your business.
services.iot_desc: Smart solutions with Arduino, sensors, and IoT integration. Residential and industrial automation.
